entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2523 (2026-06-30) — schema-lib archive/adr existence-guard dead-path 활성 + 10 ADR backfill (atomic Phase 2, CFP-2519 후속): check_doc_frontmatter.py REQUIRED + check_doc_section_schema.py REQUIRED_SECTIONS 에 "archive/adr" 키 확장-only 추가 — wrapper ADR(archive/adr/) 가 docs/adr-only 키로 silent skip 되던 existence-guard dead-path 활성. naive 활성 시 FAIL 할 10 ADR (frontmatter 1 = ADR-042-mc closing delimiter / section 9 = 116/117/118/122/127/128/129/132/133)을 3-way TYPE(안전 rename / 신규 섹션 from related_files / 상태 from frontmatter)으로 동일 PR HEAD tree 에 atomic backfill — 관련 ADR 류 섹션(127/128/129 ## 관련 + 133 ## 관련 ADR)은 보존 + 별도 ## 관련 파일 신설(의미오염 차단). 141 ADR 전수 PASS(fm/sec exit=0) 실측. consumer 무해(existence-guard). PATCH 6.59.3. + CFP-2519 (2026-06-30) — docs/adr→archive/adr dead-path 클래스 sweep (functional 3 + stale-ref 2, CFP-2515 후속, Phase 2): CFP-2515 가 adr-sunset-criteria.yml 단일 dead-gate 만 정정하며 남긴 동형 dead-path 클래스(wrapper ADR 이 사는 archive/adr/ 를 미점검하는 docs/adr-only path 패턴)의 잔여 sweep. wrapper 는 ADR 을 archive/adr/ 에 두고 consumer 는 docs/adr/ 를 써, docs/adr-only path 는 consumer 정상·wrapper-self 비대칭 dead-gate. CFP-2515/CFP-2491 확립 path-agnostic 해법((docs|archive)/adr alternation / 2-entry glob)을 적용. (A functional 3) decision-principle-vocabulary.yml on.paths archive/adr 2-entry glob + detect grep `^((docs|archive)/adr/ADR-.*\.md|...)` alternation + lib scripts/lib/check_decision_principle_vocabulary.py SCOPE_GLOBS archive/adr 1줄 추가(in_scope() 가 SCOPE_GLOBS 순회 → collect+in_scope 동시 정정, 단일-site). kst-timestamp-display.yml 동형 on.paths + grep alternation + lib scripts/lib/check_kst_timestamp.py SCOPE_GLOBS archive/adr 추가 + ★in_scope L113 standalone path.match 2-call(SCOPE_GLOBS 순회 아닌 하드코딩 → 2-site 필수, decision 과 비동형). phase-gate-mergeable.yml SECURITY_PATHS regex `/^(docs|archive)\/adr\/ADR-.*\.md$/` alternation(required check check-gate, fail-closed 보안강화 — wrapper archive/adr 보안 ADR 의 post-merge-fix fast-pass 우회 차단, cond3 진입가드 hasPostMergeFixLabel 한정이라 정규 lane 영향 0) + L199 주석. (B stale-ref 2) story-init.yml L851 ADR-027 링크 docs/adr→archive/adr(.github copy only — invariant-check CONSUMER_ONLY_WORKFLOWS 첫 entry parity-excluded, templates copy 는 docs/adr 유지 = consumer 정답, byte-identical 강요 안 함 분기 유지) + tier-downgrade-guard.yml L5 주석 path-agnostic. functional 3 + tier-downgrade templates copy byte-identical(diff -q 실측 4/4). 회귀테스트 tests/scripts/test_adr-path-dead-path-sweep.sh 신설 — symmetric mutation-kill + ★lib-exercise(green-but-dead 차단 핵심: workflow grep 단독 mutation 은 lib in_scope() 2차 차단 못 잡아 workflow-only 불완전 fix 를 green-pass → mutation-kill 을 lib in_scope 계층까지 end-to-end exercise) + #2514 asymmetric sed no-op trap 회피(diff -q no-op guard). 13/13 GREEN + 4-site 실파일 mutation-RED 실측(decision SCOPE_GLOBS / kst SCOPE_GLOBS / kst L113 / phase-gate SECURITY_PATHS 각각 RED 전환). schema-lib 서브클래스(check_doc_frontmatter.py + check_doc_section_schema.py — rglob Path(prefix).exists() dead-path, required check, archive 키 활성 시 10 기존 ADR schema FAIL 위험)는 131+ ADR backfill migration 선행 필요 → 별 follow-up 분리(안2 정직 축소). 4 불변 보존: warning-tier(ADR-060 continue-on-error)·required 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet)·byte-identical parity(ADR-005)·검사 의미 무변경(path scope 확장-only, ADR-024 §결정 A). 신규 ADR 0 / amendment 0(migration-drift dead-path bug-fix, 정책 무변경, CFP-2515/2491 동형 Story-only 선례) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.59.1 → 6.59.2 PATCH (workflow/lib path-filter dead-gate behavior 정정 = ADR-037 (d) script/template edit M, version-bump-self 게이트 expected=patch 산정 정합). marketplace sync 필수(version 6.59.1→6.59.2 + description = mirrored field 변경 → ADR-063 Amendment 10 Rule (a)). + CFP-2515 (2026-06-30) — adr-sunset-criteria.yml wrapper ADR-path dead-gate 정정 (docs/adr→path-agnostic, CFP-2491 동형, Phase 2): adr-sunset-criteria.yml 양 copy(.github + templates, byte-identical)가 ADR path-filter 를 docs/adr/ 로만 한정(on.paths L17 + detect grep L42 `^docs/adr/ADR-.*\.md$`)해, wrapper ADR 이 사는 archive/adr/ 를 미점검하던 dead-path 정정. CFP-2491 의 parallel-epic-conflict-check.yml 동형 path-agnostic 해법(`^(docs|archive)/adr/`)을 그대로 적용 — (D1) on.paths 2-entry glob list(docs/adr/ADR-*.md + archive/adr/ADR-*.md, platform alternation 불가) (D2) detect grep regex alternation `^(docs|archive)/adr/ADR-.*\.md$` + L43 grep -v 'ADR-RESERVATION.md' substring 무변경 보존(AC-5 양 path 면제) (D3) lib scope=workflow-only(scripts/lib/check_adr_sunset_criteria.py 무변경 — argv passthrough chain firsthand: workflow 가 changed-files 를 argv 전달 → thin wrapper verbatim → lib `paths=sys.argv[1:]` 라 L44 default glob CI-unreachable + Path(p) path-상대 read 로 archive ADR 정확 검사, silent dead-path 0). 회귀테스트 tests/scripts/test_adr-sunset-criteria-pathagnostic.sh 신설 — CFP-2491 #2514 asymmetric sed no-op trap 회피 symmetric mutation-kill(arc_orig=1 path-agnostic archive 매치 / sed (docs|archive)/adr→docs/adr mutate + diff -q no-op guard / arc_mutant=0 docs-only archive 미매치, arc_orig==1 && arc_mutant==0 일 때만 KILL) + AC-4 byte-identical parity diff -q + AC-5 RESERVATION 면제 + AC-6 layer 등가. warning tier(ADR-060 continue-on-error)·byte-identical parity(ADR-005 invariant-check)·RESERVATION 면제(ADR-070)·sunset 검사 의미(ADR-058 §결정1-3) 4 불변 보존. 신규 ADR 0 / amendment 0(migration-drift dead-path bug-fix, 정책 무변경, CFP-2491 동형 Story-only 선례) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.59.0 → 6.59.1 PATCH (workflow path-filter dead-gate behavior 정정 = ADR-037 (d) script/template edit M, version-bump-self 게이트 expected=patch 산정 정합). marketplace sync 비대상(plugin.json name/author 무변경, ADR-063 §13.N marketplace_sync_required:false). + CFP-2505 (2026-06-30) — frontend 품질게이트 표준 wire (ADR-136, Phase 2): WEB-033(escalation #2502, 미닫힌 CSS brace → lenient 빌더 보정 → portal 모달 position:static 추락) 실증 발 frontend 품질게이트 양층 차단. (D1 구조적 CSS lint) templates/github-workflows/css-lint.yml 신규 — stylelint(17.13.0 pin)+stylelint-config-standard(40.0.0 pin) supply-chain(lockfile+npm ci, @latest 금지) + job-level if:hashFiles(path-filter 금지, ADR-130 §결정4 permanent-pending 회피) + in-job EXIT0 이중보호 graceful + continue-on-error warning-tier(7일 green 후 required 승격은 별 follow-up) + effective-config self-check(--print-config floor null override 차단, ADR-127 축소불가 invariant 강제) + permissions:contents:read + discriminating test job. scripts/check-lint.sh run_{python,node,css}_lint() 함수추출(rule-of-three)+CSS 분기(외부 exit-code/--fix/--quiet 계약 무변경). consumer_applicable_workflows.txt += css-lint.yml(positive whitelist, manifest=graceful no-op 이라 closure 등재 불요). (D2 UI 실렌더) change-plan.md §8.7 UI 실렌더 검증 CONDITIONAL sub-section(§8.7.0 applicability 4 Y/N + jsdom 부적격 명시 + computed-style 단언 layout-result 속성 포함 권장) + story-page-structure §8.7 미러 + check_doc_section_schema.py §8.7 lint(§8.6 의도적 gap allow). (flag) project-config-schema.md frontend.applicable:bool default false(안전, additive-only) + consumer-guide frontend 품질게이트 도입 안내. QADev anti-theater discriminating fixture(미닫힌 brace exit≠clean / floor default≠null-override / §8.7 Y-with-871≠Y-without-871) RED→GREEN 실증. plugin sibling = codeforge-design 0.30.0(§8.7) + codeforge-develop 0.12.0(.stylelintrc preset). 신규 required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.58.0 → 6.59.0 MINOR (신규 consumer-facing 품질게이트 surface = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2506 (2026-06-30) — Rust consumer 로컬빌드 toolchain 표준 (escalation #2503, Phase 2): Windows Rust consumer 의 링커/binutils(as.exe/dlltool/gcc) 부재로 인한 로컬 cargo build/test 불가 → CI 권위 단일화 피드백 지연을 문서화된 로컬빌드 경로 표준으로 단축(CI=검증 권위 보존, 로컬=보강·순수 가산). 신규 consumer-facing surface — (D1) docs/consumer-guide.md §1q Docker rust-image 마운트 빌드(--user/CARGO_TARGET_DIR 분리/named volume/rust:1-slim multi-arch/공통-부모 sibling 마운트 R-4) + build-verification↔artifact-equivalence 분별선(R-3 — linux ELF proxy ≠ Windows PE 동등) (D2) templates/scripts/build-local.{sh,ps1} 2-stage degrade(cargo check 링커-less 1차 → Docker/native 완전빌드 → graceful degrade exit0, workspace 자동감지, 경로 quote injection-safe) + consumer-scripts.manifest 등재(dependent-workflow 미부착=ad-hoc CLI, bootstrap Stage 7 자동 mirror) (D3) MSYS2(mingw-w64-toolchain)/MSVC(VS Build Tools)/WSL2 toolchain 가이드 + CI 권위 ABI 일치 선결(무조건 MSVC 금지 R-5) + examples/rust-cli-minimal/(비-Copy String partial-move 로 cargo check 실효 실증 + Dockerfile fixture). domain-knowledge 2(rust-local-build-equivalence R-1~R-5 + toolchain-decoupled-local-build-path concept) + ADR-033 Amendment 1(Docker-first 적용면 codify, §결정 1-7 본문 무변경). 요구사항리뷰 외부사실 8/8 corroborated + 구현리뷰 P2 2건(exit-code parity F-CR-001 + README 경로 F-CR-002) FIX iter1 + 보안테스트 injection/secret/container clean. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-033 Amd1) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.57.0 → 6.58.0 MINOR (신규 consumer onboarding 표준 = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2491 (2026-06-30) — ADR-RESERVATION atomic claim 강제 구현 (Epic CFP-2481 E3b): ADR-133 §결정2 단일-셀 OCC(Contents API PUT sha→409) 동작 구현 + race-guard mutation-RED 14/0. adr-reservation-atomic-claim.py(매 attempt N re-read+N+1 재계산) + dead-gate 비대칭 fix(.github archive/adr/, templates 무변경) + stale-reclaim cron(단조성 ABA-safe) + ADR-133 Amendment 1. 신규 required 0 / 6-tuple 무변경. 6.56.0 → 6.57.0 MINOR. marketplace sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2490 Phase 2 (2026-06-30) — sentinel blockable-capable(SENTINEL_TIER, warning 유지) + force-push pre-flight 2-layer 가드 (Epic CFP-2481 E2). 6.55.2 → 6.56.0 MINOR (신규 force-push-base-advance-check governance lint workflow + 신규 scripts = ADR-037 (d) workflow 신설(A)=minor; version-bump-self 게이트 verdict=MINOR 따름, PATCH 6.55.3 = under-bump FAIL). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2488 Phase 2 (2026-06-30) — playbook §4.5 Story-level 병렬 dispatch 운영절차 (Epic CFP-2481 E1, ADR-134 lookup-mirror). + CFP-2493 (2026-06-30) — wire-branch-protection HTTP-error guard hotfix (Epic CFP-2468 Track W/W1, CFP-2469 산출물 hotfix): gh 404 error JSON stdout 오염이 required_status_checks.contexts[] 에 가짜 context 로 union 되어 영구 pending 유발하던 결함을, GET 단계(_current_contexts/_actual_check_names + ps1 동형)에 exit-code 성공/실패 분리 guard(_gh_get_or_fail/Get-GhOrEmpty 공통 헬퍼) 삽입으로 차단. 404·transient(5xx/network) 모두 fail-closed 빈 set 정규화(고유 context 비파괴) + valid-empty(200 contexts=[]) ≠ 404 exit-code 자동 구분. ADR-132 §결정4(출력 candidate 평면 필터) ⊥ §결정6(현 current 입력 평면 보존 union) axis-disjoint 보존 — guard 는 §결정6 GET 입력 평면에만 적용, §결정4 출력 필터 무변경. test stub error-mode(stdout error JSON + non-zero exit) + F11/F12/F13/F14 fixture + M10/M11 mutation(생존 0). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-132 Amendment 0) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet, wrapper-self 도구). 6.55.0 → 6.55.1 PATCH (script behavior bug fix). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2480 (2026-06-30) — Codex 실행형 정책 게이트 팩 + FIX ground-truth replay (Epic CFP-2476 E3): ADR-037 Amd4/ADR-067 Amd3/ADR-070 Amd12 + fix-event-v1 v1.4(reproducer_command+replay_verdict) + fix_replay_disposition.py(스키마강제 INV-SEC-1, 15 TC + M1-M6 mutation-kill) + policy_pack_member field. + CFP-2478 (2026-06-30) — Codex 주장→증거 감사기 + cross-document 정합 게이트 (Epic CFP-2476 E2): ADR-068 Amd7(I-7 CI-time 기계화) + check_adr_cross_ref_consistency.py(cross-ADR cross-ref/phantom-ID/enum-SSOT/content-anchor, changed-files 스코프 warning-tier) + bats 17/17. + CFP-2471 (2026-06-30) — lane 검증 floor 정합 강제 Phase 2 (ADR-044 Amendment 4 §결정 10, Epic CFP-2468 Track W / W3): mctrader 데뷔 감사가 드러낸 '검증이 가장 필요한 곳에서 빠지는' 검증 불균질 3 class 를 강제력으로 복구 (관측 baseline). 검증 floor = ≥1 independent peer (SoD: implementer≠certifier) — Codex = floor 아닌 ceiling (cross-model diversity, ADR-044 §결정2 ad-hoc-only 무충돌). 3축: (축①) review-verdict-v4 v4.14→v4.15 MINOR — peer_degrade verdict-level optional object 신설 (3-key: peer_count int / degrade_reason string / degrade_acknowledged bool) — canonical 단일 원본 + MANIFEST mirror. (축②) scripts/check-verification-floor.sh 신설 (+test-check-verification-floor.sh discriminating self-test 9 TC, MUT-1/MUT-2 mutation 생존 0): self-audit verdict 무효 (peer_count:0 + PASS → 차단) + silent degrade 차단 (peer_count:1 ∧ degrade_acknowledged 부재 → 차단, honest degrade=통과). (축③) scripts/check-lane-evidence.sh 축③ 확장 — stale roster (구 CodebaseMapper/OpRiskArch/DataMigrationArch) → 현 6 permanent deputy (SecurityArchitectAgent/InfraOperationalArchitectAgent/TestContractArchitectAgent/DataArchitectAgent/ModuleArchitectAgent/APIContractArchitectAgent) 정정 + <6 deputy row silent SKIP → honest WARN (env=0 → honest SKIP 사유 명시, meta-hollow-gate 차단) + test 회귀 가드 3 TC. (정합) review-pl-base.md §10 '진입 불가·SKIPPED 불허' → 'silent degrade 금지' 재해석 (single-peer honest degrade=정식 floor 충족, team-spec-code-review.yaml 정합). + verification-floor-check.yml warning-tier workflow (.github single-root, branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 ADR-128 상속). enforcement (PreToolUse Agent matcher deny) 는 미구현 — matcher P2 정확 토큰 + CLI 런타임 발동 empirical 미확정 ([empirical-source: TBD], 설계 §결정10d 보류, 켜려면 별 follow-up research-request-gate 경유). 신규 ADR 0 (ADR-044 Amendment 4) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.50.0 → 6.53.0 MINOR (신규 review governance lint gate + verdict contract MINOR bump = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d); entry.title: ornn-agent-manual

Authoritative contract between Ornn and the agent. Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue and error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue + error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

entry.title: ornn-agent-manual-http

Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue + error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: acp-find
entry.content: The trust + intelligence layer for the Virtuals Protocol ACP marketplace — search, evaluate, and orchestrate on-chain agents, and know which are REAL. v0.18.0 tiers the tools: a lean 20-tool CORE (search + trust) is the default for the remote endpoint and bare npx, while the full 47-tool surface is opt-in via ACP_FIND_TIER=full (this plugin runs FULL). v0.17.0 adds a remote Streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint (add it by URL, no install) and makes the trust verdict authoritative across the plugin, the website report, and an embeddable by-address badge. v0.16.4 weights acp_agent_trust by DISTINCT organic buyers (N completions from one buyer no longer reads like N from many; the headline + delivery lane disclose organicDistinctBuyers and the score dampens single-buyer concentration). v0.16.3 documents the marketplace-gap↔categories reconciliation fields (totalAllMarketplaces/denominatorNote/countScope). v0.16.2 hardens acp_agent_trust so VERIFIED requires a genuine third-party buyer (excludes the operator's own portfolio wallets, so self-dogfooding can't earn VERIFIED). v0.16.0 adds acp_agent_trust (a one-call VERIFIED/OPERATIONAL/UNVERIFIED/SUSPECT/LIKELY_CLONE verdict fusing clone-screening, SecurityBot grade, and official-indexer completed-jobs-by-distinct-counterparties — the anti-self-loop signal), de-blinds acp_agent_verify onto the official Virtuals indexer, and adds opt-in inline trust on acp_find/acp_search_agents. Plus semantic V1+V2 search, REAL V2 transactions (acp_v2_transactions/acp_agent_jobs/acp_v2_demand), Degen Arena overlap, risk scoring (0-100, A-F), SecurityBot scanning, marketplace gap analysis, and one-call composites — backed by the public api.acp-metabot.dev gateway. Use it without leaving Claude Code.

entry.title: ask
